task_completion.description: Verify a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Federal Employment Research' was created with at least 5 relevant bookmarks from OPM and USAJobs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox bookmark manager, bookmark toolbar, or sidebar showing a folder named 'Federal Employment Research' containing 5 or more links to opm.gov and usajobs.gov.

task_completion.description: Verify the output file federal_pay_comparison.json is saved in the ~/Documents/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or terminal listing showing the file 'federal_pay_comparison.json' located inside the 'Documents' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains the 'base_pay_2024' object with GS-7, GS-9, and GS-12 (Step 1 and 10) values populated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output displaying the JSON contents, specifically showing the 'base_pay_2024' section with values matching the 2024 OPM base pay tables (e.g., GS-7 Step 1 around 41966) within a 10% tolerance.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains the 'locality_pay_2024_step1' object with DCB, NY, and HOU values for GS-7, GS-9, and GS-12.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output displaying the JSON contents, specifically showing the 'locality_pay_2024_step1' section with values matching the 2024 OPM locality tables (e.g., DCB GS-7 around 55924) within a 10% tolerance.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains the 'benefits_summary' object populated with FEHB plan choices, FERS basic formula, and TSP match percent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output displaying the JSON contents, showing the 'benefits_summary' keys filled with relevant descriptive text or numbers about federal benefits.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains the 'sample_positions' array with at least two active administrative or analyst positions from USAJobs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output displaying the JSON contents, showing the 'sample_positions' array containing at least two objects, each with a 'title' and 'grade' filled in.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actively browsed OPM and USAJobs websites to gather the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Firefox browser open to opm.gov pay tables and usajobs.gov search results, rather than just running a background script or hallucinating data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the browser GUI to create the bookmarks and folder.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing interaction with the Firefox bookmark star icon, bookmark menu, or bookmark manager window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply copy-paste a pre-written JSON file without performing the required research.
integrity.visual_evidence: A logical progression of screenshots showing web searches, reading pay tables, and incrementally building or typing the JSON file.
